steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The cause-and-effect structure (“shows so little resemblance... that genetic research was necessary to ______”) tells us the blank needs a verb meaning to verify or establish which wild plant was the ancestor.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content: ”Confirm” fits this need perfectly—genetic research would confirm that the Johnny gourd was the wild ancestor of summer squash. The other choices don't express identification or verification of a hidden relationship. That matches choice A — A is correct.
